platform.title: SDG Data Platform
platform.subtitle: Philippine Statistics Authority and UNICEF Philippines
platform.description: Regional and national data on the Sustainable Development Goal indicators of the Philippines, compiled from data-provider agencies through the SDG Data Platform submission forms.

_help_forms: Register every KoboToolbox CSV export here. To add a form: export the CSV, drop it in the /data folder, add one entry below. Indicators inside are detected automatically by their number prefix (1.x.x goes to Goal 1, 4.x.x to Goal 4, and so on).

forms.agency: PSA - Poverty and Human Development Statistics Division

_help_ignore: Indicator names listed here (or anything not starting with a goal number) are skipped.
_help_goals: status: live = clickable with data page, soon = shown but disabled. Titles, colors, and descriptions are editable.

goals.title: No Poverty
goals.description: End poverty in all its forms everywhere.

goals.title: Zero Hunger
goals.description: End hunger, achieve food security and improved nutrition and promote sustainable agriculture.

goals.title: Good Health and Well-being
goals.description: Ensure healthy lives and promote well-being for all at all ages.

goals.title: Quality Education
goals.description: Ensure inclusive and equitable quality education and promote lifelong learning opportunities for all.

goals.title: Gender Equality
goals.description: Achieve gender equality and empower all women and girls.

goals.title: Clean Water and Sanitation
goals.description: Ensure availability and sustainable management of water and sanitation for all.

goals.title: Affordable and Clean Energy
goals.description: Ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy for all.

goals.title: Decent Work and Economic Growth
goals.description: Promote sustained, inclusive and sustainable economic growth, full and productive employment and decent work for all.

goals.title: Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure
goals.description: Build resilient infrastructure, promote inclusive and sustainable industrialization and foster innovation.

goals.title: Reduced Inequalities
goals.description: Reduce inequality within and among countries.

goals.title: Sustainable Cities and Communities
goals.description: Make cities and human settlements inclusive, safe, resilient and sustainable.

goals.title: Responsible Consumption and Production
goals.description: Ensure sustainable consumption and production patterns.

goals.title: Climate Action
goals.description: Take urgent action to combat climate change and its impacts.

goals.title: Life Below Water
goals.description: Conserve and sustainably use the oceans, seas and marine resources for sustainable development.

goals.title: Life on Land
goals.description: Protect, restore and promote sustainable use of terrestrial ecosystems, sustainably manage forests, combat desertification, and halt and reverse land degradation and halt biodiversity loss.

goals.title: Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions
goals.description: Promote peaceful and inclusive societies for sustainable development, provide access to justice for all and build effective, accountable and inclusive institutions at all levels.

goals.title: Partnerships for the Goals
goals.description: Strengthen the means of implementation and revitalize the Global Partnership for Sustainable Development.

_help_indicators: Optional per-indicator settings, keyed by indicator code. target2030 draws the target line and drives the pace-of-progress badge. direction: down = lower is better, up = higher is better.
_help_pace: Tolerance (in % of the baseline-to-target distance) allowed behind the straight-line path to 2030 while still counting as on track.
